description:
Calculate 2011 sales commissions for each Support Representative from the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) and export the results to a new table named 'commissions_2011' in the payroll database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/payroll.db). 

Commissions are calculated for items sold in 2011 using the formula Sum(Quantity * UnitPrice * Rate) with the following rates by track genre: 
- Rock: 15%
- Latin: 10%
- All other genres: 5%

The 'commissions_2011' table must include the following columns:
- EmployeeId (Integer)
- FullName (Text, format: 'FirstName LastName')
- TotalCommission (Numeric, rounded to 2 decimal places)

Save the SQL script used for these calculations to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/calculate_commissions.sql.
